title: NSS in JUIT
content: NSS in JUIT Year of NSS established April 2023 NSS Programme Coordinator: Dr. Nishant Jain, Assistant Professor, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering Faculty Members: Dr. Pardeep Garg Assistant Professor, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering Dr. Ashok Nadda Assistant Professor, Department of Biotechnology & Bioinformatics No. of NSS Units Sanctioned: 1 (maximum 100 Volunteers)
